data.title: Nvidia Earnings Beat, Strong Outlook Calm Jittery Markets; Bitcoin Re-Takes $90K
data.description:
Nvidia's earnings report exceeded analysts' expectations, and the company provided a robust outlook for the future, which helped soothe the anxious sentiments in the financial markets. In a related development, Bitcoin has successfully regained the $90,000 mark, signaling a rally in cryptocurrency values.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/11/19/nvidia-earnings-beat-strong-outlook-calms-jittery-markets-bitcoin-re-takes-usd90k

data.title: NVIDIA Posts Record $57 Billion Revenue in Q3 FY26 as AI Demand Explodes
data.description:
NVIDIA reported its strongest quarter in company history on November 19, 2025, delivering $57. 0 billion in revenue for Q3 fiscal 2026. The results mark a 22% jump from Q2 and a 62% surge year-over-year, underscoring the massive global demand for accelerated computing and AI infrastructure
source: https://www.ethnews.com/nvidia-posts-record-57-billion-revenue-in-q3-fy26-as-ai-demand-explodes/

data.title: Nvidia See $57 Billion in Q3 Revenue Beating Earnings Expectation: Why This is HUGE for Stocks and Crypto
data.description:
Nvidia has reported an impressive revenue figure of $57 billion for the third quarter, which significantly exceeds analysts' earnings expectations. This remarkable performance not only highlights the company's robust growth and market dominance in the technology sector but also underscores the potential implications for the overall stock market and the cryptocurrency landscape. The positive financial results from Nvidia could signal increased investor confidence, potentially leading to a surge in stock prices across the tech sector. Additionally, as Nvidia plays a crucial role in powering AI and high-performance computing, its success may also influence the demand for cryptocurrencies, particularly those related to blockchain technology and decentralized finance, which rely on similar cutting-edge advancements. This confluence of factors makes Nvidia's robust quarterly earnings a pivotal event, with far-reaching consequences for investors in both traditional stocks and the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency market.
source: https://blocknews.com/nvidia-see-57-billion-in-q3-revenue-beating-earnings-expectation-why-this-is-huge-for-stocks-and-crypto/

data.title: Bitcoin Has Slipped Into Bear Market Territory Based on Historic Cycle Signals
data.description:
Crypto analyst Lark Davis shared a stark assessment of Bitcoin’s market structure, warning that according to the traditional 4-year cycle model, Bitcoin has now entered bear market territory. Davis highlighted that Bitcoin’s current drawdown matches the phase in previous cycles where momentum peaked and a multi-month decline followed.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-has-slipped-into-bear-market-territory-based-on-historic-cycle-signals/

data.title: MP Materials carves out strategic 49% JV with US Pentagon and Saudi to refine rare earths
data.description:

MP and the Pentagon will share a 49% stake, while Maaden will hold no less than 51%, according to the company. The deal sent […]

data.title: Ethereum Slides Below $3,000 Again as Selling Pressure Accelerates
data.description:
Ethereum fell sharply on Tuesday, dropping 5. 8% over the past 24 hours and slipping below the $3,000 mark for the first time this month. The decline mirrors the broader market’s correction, but ETH’s technical indicators show a clearer loss of momentum that has traders watching key support zones closely
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-slides-below-3000-again-as-selling-pressure-accelerates/

data.title: UAE Tripples Holdings of BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Amid Crypto Market Crash
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates has significantly increased its investments in BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) during a time of turmoil in the cryptocurrency market, where prices have plummeted and investor confidence has wavered. This strategic move reflects the UAE's commitment to bolstering its financial portfolio, even amidst economic uncertainty in the digital asset space.
source: https://blocknews.com/uae-tripples-holdings-of-blackrocks-spot-bitcoin-etf-amid-crypto-market-crash/

data.title: BTC-Backed Bond Breaks New Ground in New Hampshire — Here Is How It’s Reshaping Public Finance
data.description:
The groundbreaking BTC-backed bond initiative in New Hampshire represents a significant and innovative shift in the realm of public finance, introducing a novel approach that integrates cryptocurrency into traditional funding mechanisms. This initiative not only highlights the state's willingness to embrace emerging financial technologies but also sets a precedent for other regions to follow. By utilizing Bitcoin as a backing for municipal bonds, New Hampshire is paving the way for a more flexible and accessible financial landscape, potentially changing how public projects are financed and funded. As local governments explore the implications of this novel approach, it is clear that this movement could reshape the future of public finance, attracting new investors and redefining the relationship between municipalities and the digital economy.
source: https://blocknews.com/btc-backed-bond-breaks-new-ground-in-new-hampshire-here-is-how-its-reshaping-public-finance/
